'''âs-d-b''' ('''sadaba''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quich|quich]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-d-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quich|quich]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-d-b
|-
! Lemma
| sadaba
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sadabithi|sadabithi]] || [[word:sadabiji|sadabiji]] || [[word:sadabishi|sadabishi]] || [[word:sadabi|sadabi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sadabuthuth|sadabuthuth]] || [[word:sadabujuj|sadabujuj]] || [[word:sadabushush|sadabushush]] || [[word:sadab|sadab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sadabuthu|sadabuthu]] || [[word:sadabuju|sadabuju]] || [[word:sadabushu|sadabushu]] || [[word:sadabu|sadabu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sadabufuth|sadabufuth]] || [[word:sadabufuj|sadabufuj]] || [[word:sadabufush|sadabufush]] || [[word:sadabuf|sadabuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sadabethe|sadabethe]] || [[word:sadabeje|sadabeje]] || [[word:sadabeshe|sadabeshe]] || [[word:sadabe|sadabe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sadabothoth|sadabothoth]] || [[word:sadabojoj|sadabojoj]] || [[word:sadaboshosh|sadaboshosh]] || [[word:sadab|sadab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sadabotho|sadabotho]] || [[word:sadabojo|sadabojo]] || [[word:sadabosho|sadabosho]] || [[word:sadabo|sadabo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sadabofoth|sadabofoth]] || [[word:sadabofoj|sadabofoj]] || [[word:sadabofosh|sadabofosh]] || [[word:sadabof|sadabof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sadabĂŠthĂŠ|sadabĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:sadabĂŠjĂŠ|sadabĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:sadabĂŠshĂŠ|sadabĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:sadabĂŠ|sadabĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sadabathath|sadabathath]] || [[word:sadabajaj|sadabajaj]] || [[word:sadabashash|sadabashash]] || [[word:sadab|sadab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sadabatha|sadabatha]] || [[word:sadabaja|sadabaja]] || [[word:sadabasha|sadabasha]] || [[word:sadaba|sadaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sadabafath|sadabafath]] || [[word:sadabafaj|sadabafaj]] || [[word:sadabafash|sadabafash]] || [[word:sadabaf|sadabaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:sadabasha|sadabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosadabasha|gosadabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisadabasha|gokisadabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:sadabnĂŒsha|sadabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosadabnknĂŒsha|gosadabnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisadabnĂŒsha|gokisadabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sadabshĂ«sha|sadabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosadabnkshĂ«sha|gosadabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisadabshĂ«sha|gokisadabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sadabrosha|sadabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosadabnkrosha|gosadabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisadabrosha|gokisadabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sadabmusha|sadabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosadabnkmusha|gosadabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisadabmusha|gokisadabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sadabsherasha|sadabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosadabnksherasha|gosadabnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisadabsherasha|gokisadabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:sadabngasha|sadabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosadabnkngasha|gosadabnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisadabngasha|gokisadabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sadabyasha|sadabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosadabnkyasha|gosadabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisadabyasha|gokisadabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sadabyamasha|sadabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosadabnkyamasha|gosadabnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisadabyamasha|gokisadabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sadabnĂŒshĂ«sha|sadabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosadabnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gosadabnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisadabnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokisadabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sadabnĂŒrosha|sadabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosadabnknĂŒrosha|gosadabnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisadabnĂŒrosha|gokisadabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sadabnĂŒmusha|sadabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosadabnknĂŒmusha|gosadabnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisadabnĂŒmusha|gokisadabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sadabshĂ«nĂŒsha|sadabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosadabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gosadabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisadabshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokisadabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sadabshĂ«rosha|sadabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosadabnkshĂ«rosha|gosadabnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisadabshĂ«rosha|gokisadabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sadabshĂ«musha|sadabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosadabnkshĂ«musha|gosadabnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisadabshĂ«musha|gokisadabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sadabronĂŒsha|sadabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosadabnkronĂŒsha|gosadabnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisadabronĂŒsha|gokisadabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sadabroshĂ«sha|sadabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosadabnkroshĂ«sha|gosadabnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisadabroshĂ«sha|gokisadabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sadabromusha|sadabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosadabnkromusha|gosadabnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisadabromusha|gokisadabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sadabmunĂŒsha|sadabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosadabnkmunĂŒsha|gosadabnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisadabmunĂŒsha|gokisadabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sadabmushĂ«sha|sadabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosadabnkmushĂ«sha|gosadabnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisadabmushĂ«sha|gokisadabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sadabmurosha|sadabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosadabnkmurosha|gosadabnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisadabmurosha|gokisadabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:sadab|sadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sĂŠdĂŠb|sĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosadab|hosadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosĂŠdĂŠb|hosĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosadab|hohosadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosĂŠdĂŠb|hohosĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒsadab|nĂŒsadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒsĂŠdĂŠb|nĂŒsĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsadab|nĂŒnĂŒsadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠdĂŠb|nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻsadab|nĂŻsadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻsĂŠdĂŠb|nĂŻsĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsadab|nĂŻnĂŻsadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠdĂŠb|nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusadab|lusadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lusĂŠdĂŠb|lusĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusadab|lulusadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusĂŠdĂŠb|lulusĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisadab|lisadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lisĂŠdĂŠb|lisĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisadab|lilisadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisĂŠdĂŠb|lilisĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosadab|kosadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosĂŠdĂŠb|kosĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosadab|kokosadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosĂŠdĂŠb|kokosĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesadab|kesadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesĂŠdĂŠb|kesĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesadab|kekesadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesĂŠdĂŠb|kekesĂŠdĂŠb]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
